Bash(cd /c/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/tojo-assistant && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: LLM-agnostic provider system, browser-based UI, script generation

Major architecture changes:
- LLM-agnostic: users bring their own AI \(OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Groq,
  or free local Ollama\). No new subscription needed — saves money.
- Browser-based: app runs directly in Chrome, no Electron required for MVP.
  Settings modal lets users pick their provider and paste their API key.
- Script generation skill: AI writes automation scripts for web scraping,
  file watching, data pipelines, and more. Complete runnable JS/Node code.
- Provider badge shows connection status in the header.
- Markdown rendering in chat \(code blocks, bold, inline code\).
- 34 tests passing \(up from 24\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin master 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/Immanuelle/Documents/Github/tojo-assistant && git add src/renderer/ src/agent/llm-provider.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Rainbow Dash branding + use OpenClaw gateway properly

Two big fixes:

1. BRANDING: Replace lobster mascot with Rainbow Dash themed design.
   Rainbow gradient title, sky blue background, rainbow typing dots,
   gradient send button and user message bubbles. Rainbow stripe at top.

2. ARCHITECTURE: Remove custom LLM API code. Now properly uses OpenClaw's
   gateway API \(POST /v1/chat/completions at localhost:18789\). OpenClaw
   handles all LLM provider routing — users configure their preferred
   model \(ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, etc.\) through OpenClaw itself.
   Settings modal simplified to just gateway URL + auth token.

   This means zero API key management on our side. OpenClaw does it all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin master 2>&1)

feat: marketing strategy suite — competitor analysis, personas, Blue Ocean, email campaigns

Laura's ideas implemented as four new skills:

1. Competitor Analysis — paste your reviews + rival's reviews, get a
   side-by-side breakdown of strengths, weaknesses, gaps, and an
   action plan to beat them.

2. Customer Personas — generate detailed buyer profiles from reviews
   and email list data. Each persona includes demographics, values,
   pain points, communication style, color palette \(hex codes\), and
   tailored email approach.

3. Blue Ocean Strategy — the real framework \(Kim & Mauborgne\).
   Strategy Canvas, Four Actions \(Eliminate/Reduce/Raise/Create\),
   and concrete blue ocean opportunities with implementation steps.

4. Email Marketing — full campaign generator with subject lines,
   email body, visual design specs \(hex colors, layout, font mood\),
   timing recommendations, and A/B testing guidance. Tailored per
   customer persona.

UI updated with two rows of quick actions — marketing strategy on
top \(Rival Analysis, Personas, Blue Ocean, Campaigns\), tools below
\(Sort Emails, Files, Scripts, Settings\).

50 tests passing \(up from 34\).
